---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature, flag, or notifier backend.
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## The problem

What problem does this feature solve? A specific workflow that's painful today,
or a missing capability you keep needing.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see — a CLI flag, a config option, a new notifier backend,
an API change, ...

## Alternatives considered

Other ways you've tried to solve this, and why they didn't fit.

## Additional context

Example commands, links to similar features in other tools, screenshots if the
output format is the issue.
